Tank vs.Tankless: Choosing the Right Water Heater and Installation Tips

Tank vs.Tankless: Choosing the Right Water Heater and Installation Tips

Publish Date : 2025-02-18
Views : 1200
(760) 392-7616 Schedule An Appointment

FAQs

Q1. How much does the tankless water heater installer charge?

The cost for installing a tankless water heater typically ranges from $1,700 to $5,000 when done by a licensed and certified installer. Such costs depend on the type of model being used, its source of power, and any additional work required in the house.

Q2. How often should maintenance of tankless heaters be done?

We recommend doing maintenance yearly to avoid mineral buildup affecting the heater's efficiency. If you live in a hard-water region, you might want to descale it more often.

Q3. Is the tankless water heater worth it?

Definitely! With energy savings, a longer life span, and the endless provision of hot water, it is a great investment for any household.

Q4. Can I install my own tankless water heater?

You may do so, but we advise hiring a professional to install it to ensure compliance with local codes, safety regulations, and to avoid any issues with your warranty.

Q5. What are the signs that a tankless hot water heater needs repair?

Some signals that repair may be required include inconsistent water temperature, low water pressure, flashing error codes, or no hot water at all. If you observe one or more of these issues, seek professional assistance for repair without delay.
